Brazilian Real (BRL) â€” CoT Supplementary Methodology

Market: Brazilian Real FX Futures Exchange: CME Role: Commodity-linked EM risk expression
  • Positioning reflects commodity cycles and global liquidity.
  • Crowding increases sensitivity to USD tightening and risk-off moves.
  • Divergence vs industrial metals flags macro regime stress.
  • Use BRL to reinforce EM and commodity-cycle interpretation.
Interpretation-only methodology. Not a trading signal.
